questions.question:
Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP)



Others: UGC NET CSE | December 2011 | Part 2 | Question: 44
options: Does not integrate well with the functional areas other than operations.
Automate and integrates the majority of business processes.

questions.question:
Which of the following is false concerning Enterprise Resource Planning (ERP) ?



Others: UGC NET CSE | December 2011 | Part 2 | Question: 45
options: It attempts to automate and integrate the majority of business processes.
It shares common data and practices across the enterprise.
It provides and access information in a real-time environment.
